args: SK케미칼(Customer ID 55747)의 근무표 엑셀 업로드 access log 조회. prod 환경, 2026-03-10 ~ 2026-03-25 기간. customerId 55747이면서 ipath에 "upload-excel" 또는 "bulk-upload" 또는 "shift-schedule"+"upload" 포함하는 access log. 관련 API: POST /action/v3/time-tracking/customers/{customerIdHash}/shift-schedules/draft/upload-excel-template, POST /action/v3/time-tracking/customers/{customerIdHash}/shift-schedules/draft/upload-excel-template/dry-run, POST /api/v2/time-tracking/users/work-schedules/bulk-upload/upload, POST /api/v2/time-tracking/users/work-schedules/bulk-upload/upload/dry-run. response body, dry-run 호출 여부, publish API 호출 여부, 에러 내용 확인 필요.

prod 환경에서 아래 쿼리 4개를 실행해줘.

쿼리 1: 3명의 3월 shift schedule draft 존재 여부
SELECT user_id, date, work_plan, weekly_holiday, time_off
FROM v2_user_shift_schedule_draft
WHERE customer_id = 55747
AND user_id IN (225393, 225737, 226580)
AND date BETWEEN '2026-03-01' AND '2026-03-31'
ORDER BY user_id, date;

쿼리 2: 3명의 3월 shift schedule publish block 존재 여부
SELECT pb.user_id, pb.date, p.published_at, p.date_from, p.date_to
FROM v2_shift_schedule_publish_block pb
JOIN v2_shift_schedule_publish p ON pb.shift_schedule_publish_id = p.id
WHERE pb.customer_id = 55747
AND pb.user_id IN (225393, 225737, 226580)
AND pb.date BETWEEN '2026-03-01' AND '2026-03-31'
ORDER BY pb.user_id, pb.date;

쿼리 3: 3명의 3월 work plan 이벤트
SELECT user_id, date_from, date_to, work_plan_schedule_type, event_type, created_at
FROM v2_user_work_plan
WHERE customer_id = 55747
AND user_id IN (225393, 225737, 226580)
AND date_from <= '2026-03-31' AND date_to >= '2026-03-01'
ORDER BY user_id, created_at;

쿼리 4: 같은 팀 다른 구성원과 비교 - 동일 customer의 3월 publish block 중 대상 3명 포함/미포함 여부 확인 (최근 publish 10건)
SELECT p.id, p.actor_user_id, p.date_from, p.date_to, p.published_at,
       COUNT(DISTINCT pb.user_id) AS total_users,
       SUM(CASE WHEN pb.user_id IN (225393, 225737, 226580) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS target_user_count
FROM v2_shift_schedule_publish p
JOIN v2_shift_schedule_publish_block pb ON pb.shift_schedule_publish_id = p.id
WHERE p.customer_id = 55747
AND p.date_from <= '2026-03-31' AND p.date_to >= '2026-03-01'
GROUP BY p.id, p.actor_user_id, p.date_from, p.date_to, p.published_at
ORDER BY p.published_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
flex-review-backend 서비스에서 customer_id 217181 관련 migration 로그를 검색. 최근 7일간. 키워드: migration, 마이그레이션, deleteAllInProgress
PATCH /action/v2/operation/core/customers/224689/emails/change/bulk with body from /Users/juwon/tmp/CI-4163/bulk-email-change-request.json on prod
CI-4216 급여 정산 템플릿 지급항목 사이드이펙트

인덱스: flex-app.be-access-* (2026.03.25), ipath: *new-allowances/item*, method: POST, 시간 범위: 2026-03-25T01:00:00Z ~ 2026-03-25T10:00:00Z (UTC). 호출별 timestamp, customer_id, response status, traceId를 추출해야 한다. size를 충분히 크게 잡아서 전체 결과를 가져와라.
prod "SELECT id FROM company WHERE customer_id = 219571 LIMIT 1;"
